summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 4 updates: Contact page redesign, full Pricing page, backend /api/contact endpoint, and email updates across all pages. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend /api/contact endpoint saves messages to MongoDB successfully
Contact page shows correct layout: left side with Email/Phone/Address cards, right side with form
Contact form submits successfully and shows 'Mesaj trimis!' success message
All emails across site updated to martechassistance@gmail.com (Contact, Terms, Privacy pages)
Full pricing page at /pricing shows 'Prețuri Transparente' heading
Pricing page monthly/annual toggle works correctly (-20% for annual)
All 4 pricing plans displayed: Starter €19, Pro €49, Agency €99, Enterprise €199
Pricing comparison table with feature matrix visible and functional
FAQ section with 4 expandable items working correctly
'Vezi toate funcționalitățile' link on landing page navigates to /pricing
Contact info shows correct details: martechassistance@gmail.com, +40 721 578 660, Constanta Romania
